overview: Foodie is a full-stack food delivery web app with a Zomato/Swiggy-style design. Browse restaurants, explore menus, add items to cart, and checkout with Stripe — all with a sleek dark/light mode UI, order history, reviews, and an admin panel.
features: Home page with hero, search, food categories, featured restaurants, and popular dishes
Restaurant listing with filter by category, rating, and search
Restaurant detail page with menu, add-to-cart, and customer reviews
Shopping cart with quantity controls and Stripe checkout
Internet Identity authentication and user profile with saved addresses
Order history with status tracking and reorder
Admin panel to manage restaurants, orders, and users
Dark/light mode toggle with persistent preference
Skeleton loading states and smooth animations
